name: Salem Golf Simulator
about: Salem Golf Simulator provides a premium indoor golf experience utilizing Golfzon Vision Standard Simulators. The venue features 8-directional swing plates, auto-tee and ball retrieval systems, and high-speed camera sensors to deliver a true-to-life golf simulation. Available for hourly bookings, the facility accommodates up to 6 players per bay and is well-suited for individuals, small groups, corporate events, and parties. The simulator experience includes over 200 world-famous golf courses faithfully reproduced for an authentic challenge. With a focus on technology and convenience, Salem Golf Simulator offers an environment suitable for serious practice, casual play, and private events in Salem, Virginia.
why_golfers_like_it: High-speed camera sensors capture 2,000 frames per second for instant and accurate shot feedback
8-directional swing plate provides 80 possible lies for a realistic playing experience
Auto-tee and ball retrieval system increases pace of play and reduces physical strain

food_and_drink.notes: Food options are available for private events
Not explicitly mentioned, but BYOB is not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Top ranked simulator capable of handling up to 6 players per bay

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has food options available for private events. It is not explicitly stated if customers can bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average golfer can complete 18 holes in 1 hour. For a group of 3 playing 18 holes, a 3-hour reservation is recommended.

faq.question: Is Salem Golf Simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as being suitable for families, and the booking page mentions options for parties.
